With us, appointment scheduling is easy
Effortless scheduling for business and individuals, powerful solutions for fast-growing modern companies.
We'll handle all the cross-referencing, so you don't have to worry about double bookings.
Want to block off weekends? Set up any buffers? We make that easy.
It could be a video chat, phone call, or a walk in the park!
Discover a variety of our advanced features. Unlimited and free for individuals.
Only get booked when you want to. Set daily, weekly or monthly limits and add buffers around your events to allow you to focus or take a bre
Stand out with a custom booking link
Customize your booking link so it’s short and easy to remember for your bookers. No more long, complicated links one can easily forget.
Let your bookers overlay their calendar, receive booking confirmations via text or email, get events added to their calendar, and allow them
Reduce no-shows with automated meeting reminders
Easily send sms or meeting reminder emails about bookings, and send automated follow-ups to gather any relevant information before the meeti

James Carwell has just canceled the meeting.
Your next meeting is starting in 15 mins
Melissa Smith has rescheduled the meeting to Wed, 25 Mar 15:00.
James Oliver booked a 30min discovery call with you.
You can monetize your bookings through our Stripe integration.
Cal Video is our in-house video conferencing platform.
Each booking link can be short which makes it easy to remember.
Our solution has been designed to keep your information private and protected.
Talk to anyone around the globe with support for 65+ languages.
Embed your booking page anywhere with just a few clicks.
Effortlessly integrate with your favorite popular apps.
Easily customize your booking page to fit your brand.
